name: BuildOps Field Service Management API
what_it_does: BuildOps REST API for commercial field service and construction management platform targeting HVAC, electrical, plumbing, and mechanical contractors. Enables AI agents to manage work order creation, dispatch, and technician scheduling for commercial service contractors, handle job costing and labor tracking data for project profitability analysis, access customer and equipment service history for preventive maintenance automation, retrieve technician time tracking and GPS location data for field operations monitoring, manage service agreements and preventive maintenance scheduling, handle parts inventory and purchasing workflow for field service supply chain, access invoicing and payment collection data for commercial service billing, retrieve quoting and proposal data for service sales automation, manage subcontractor coordination for commercial construction projects, and integrate field service data with accounting, ERP, and customer management systems.
use_cases: Dispatching technicians from automated scheduling agents
Tracking job costs from commercial service profitability agents
Managing preventive maintenance from equipment service agents
Automating invoicing from commercial service billing agents
not_for: Residential HVAC without commercial contractor management focus
Enterprise manufacturing ERP without field service workflow needs
Simple work order apps without commercial contractor complexity
best_when: A commercial HVAC, electrical, or mechanical contractor using BuildOps wants AI agents to automate technician dispatch, job costing, preventive maintenance scheduling, customer communication, and invoicing for commercial service operations.
avoid_when: SAFETY RISK: Commercial HVAC and electrical work requires licensed technician qualifications for regulated work — automated dispatch of unlicensed technicians to licensed-work-required jobs creates safety and regulatory violations. Service agreement automation must preserve contractual SLA response times. Job costing automation must distinguish prevailing wage vs. non-prevailing wage labor classification for public works compliance.

auth.notes: BuildOps uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. Per-contractor account credentials. Webhooks for work order and job events. REST API with JSON. Los Angeles, California HQ. Founded 2018. VC-backed ($143M raised). Commercial-focused FSM vs. residential-focused ServiceTitan. Native integration with QuickBooks, Sage, and Spectrum. Strong in commercial HVAC, electrical, and mechanical trades. Competes with ServiceTitan for commercial field service management.

pricing.notes: Los Angeles, California. Founded 2018. VC-backed: Greenspring Associates, Coatue Management, Tiger Global ($143M+ raised). Commercial specialty contractor focus: HVAC, electrical, plumbing, fire/life safety. Job costing and financial integration as key differentiator. Competes with ServiceTitan (primarily residential) for commercial contractor market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented per client

known_agent_gotchas: SAFETY RISK: Commercial HVAC, electrical, and gas work requires licensed technicians for specific tasks; automated dispatch must validate technician license type against work order requirements
Prevailing wage compliance — public works commercial jobs have Davis-Bacon prevailing wage requirements; automated job costing must distinguish prevailing vs. non-prevailing wage labor classification
Service agreement SLA — commercial service contracts have contractual emergency response SLAs (2-4 hours); automated scheduling must preserve SLA priority queue
Job costing complexity — commercial jobs have contract billing (T&M, fixed price, GMP); ensure automated invoice generation matches contract type
Equipment warranty tracking — commercial equipment warranties affect parts coverage; automated work orders should check equipment warranty status before parts ordering
Relatively young API — BuildOps founded 2018; API and integration ecosystem is maturing; verify API stability and feature completeness for your use case
agent_readiness.security_notes: Commercial field service management. SOC2. OAuth2/API key. US. Contractor job data and customer equipment records.

security_score_components.security_notes: Field service management. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Commercial contractor and job data.
